titleStmt.title: SII 26.140: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 140. (A.R. No. 132 of 1909.) KOMARALIṄGAM, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the Karivaradarāja-perumāḷ temple.
The inscription gives the details of date viz., Khara, Āḍi 10, which may correspond to 1411 A.D., July 8 (Monday). The Śaka year was 1333.

It records a royal dānapatra (deed) to the Śrīvaishṇavas and Poruḷāḷa-dāsa, the Sthānikaṉ in charge of the Śrīkāryam of the temple of Emberumāṉ Kariyapirāṉ at Agaram Kumaraṅgabhīman alias Paridārasahōdarach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, communicated to them by the king's agent Tiruvāḻvān of Bhārgava-gōtra belonging to Perumarudūr. The deed related to the grant of 20 mā of land on the outskirts of Tiruvālanduṟai and some amount of poṉ in lieu of the irai and siddhāyam in respect of this land as tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam to the god Kariyapirāṉ. It is stated that of this land one-third portion was to be deducted as it was assigned to the god Kumaraṅgabhīmīśvaram-uḍaiyār at Melaik-Kaṇṇāḍipputtūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrīma
rājādhirājarājaparameśvaran
śrīvīrapratāpan sakala dharmma
sthāpanācārya karṇṇāṭayarāja
harihararāya Uṭaiyār pṛthivirā
jyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa kaliyuga
ttil piṟanta śakābdam 1000 3 100 3 10 2 ṉmeṟ ce
llāniṉṟa kharasamvatsarattu Āṭi mātam 10 nāḷ
Irāyaṟku Āyumrārogyaiśvaryābhivṛddhi
yum san=tānasamṛddhiyum Uṇṭākaveṇu
m Eṉṟu Irāyar nirupappaṭikku Ivaruṭai
ya kāriyattukkukkaṭava rbhāgavagotrat
tiṟ perumarutūṟ tiruvāḻiyāḻvāne
ṉ Akaram kumaraṅkabhimaṉāṉa paridārasaho
daraccaturvedimaṅkalattu Emperumāṉ
kariyapirāṉār tirumuṟṟattu śrī vai
ṣṇavarkaḷukkum śrīkāryattukkuk kaṭava
sthānikaṉ poruḷāḷadāsaṉukkum
nām kuṭutta dānapatramāvatu tiruvā
lantuṟai Ellaiyattiyil viṭṭa
perum � javibhāṭan rūpāy [2 10] Inta
nilam Irupatu māvukku muṇṭāṉa I
ṟai siddhāyattukku Uḷḷa poṉṉu
m nellum kaḻittuk kuṭuttu Aṉā
ti para ṭiṉa vum tiruviṭaiyāṭ
ṭamā laikkaṇ
kariyapirāṉāṟku viṭṭa melaikkaṇ
ṇāṭipputtūril kumaraṅkabhimīśvara
muṭaiyāṟku mūṉṟil Oru kūṟum kaḻittu
niṉṟa Iraṇṭu kūṟum tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamā
kaviṭṭu Inta Ūr nāṉkellaikkuṭ
paṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey maṟṟum Uṇṭā
ṉa Ādāyam nidhi nikṣepam jala
pāṣāṇam jhaṣṭabhogam maṟṟu
m Eppetpaṭṭa samastaprāptiyum kariyapirāṉār
cikāriyattukkum pāttiṟabhogattukkum candrādittavar
cellakkaṭavatākavum § svadattām paradattām vā yo
hareta pasṛddharām . ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi
piṣṭhāyāñjāyatekṛmiḥ . patiṉeṭṭumaṇṭala
kaḷ rakṣai śubhama
stu §
Digital edition of SII 26.140 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
